title: Asuka Has A Soul
wikitext:
[]: Asuka Has A Soul Post by Grimmjow » Wed Jun 15, 2011 1:41 am And she's tired of people saying she doesn't just because she's a ginger! She considers the term very demeaning. Everybody gets respect. I mean, Evas, Angels, Shinjis, everyone! http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DWBSqu097kE

[]: Post by child of Lilith » Wed Jun 15, 2011 3:18 am What a strange video.

[]: Post by Warren Peace » Wed Jun 15, 2011 6:23 am http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KVN_0qvuhhw

[]: Post by C.A.P. » Wed Jun 15, 2011 11:57 am RebornZombie did this better.

[]: Post by Grimmjow » Wed Jun 15, 2011 3:52 pm C.A.P. wrote: RebornZombie did this better.

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Wed Jun 15, 2011 3:56 pm But Asuka's not a ginger. She has no freckles.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Wed Jun 15, 2011 4:10 pm I watched it on mute as what seemed to mostly be a compilation of cute Asuka facial expressions.

[]: Post by Tankred » Wed Jun 15, 2011 4:10 pm TehDonutKing wrote: But Asuka's not a ginger. She has no freckles.

[]: Post by child of Lilith » Wed Jun 15, 2011 4:12 pm esselfortium wrote: I watched it on mute as what seemed to mostly be a compilation of cute Asuka facial expressions.

[]: Post by Miuzaki » Wed Jun 15, 2011 4:20 pm Asuka USED TO HAVE freckles. http://wiki.evageeks.org/File:Proposal_20_asuka.jpg look carefully at the Asuka to the left. As for her hair color... that one wont be decided anytime soon. She has thousands of them.

[]: Post by Azathoth » Wed Jun 15, 2011 4:21 pm Tankred wrote: I'm sure you can get gingers without freckles.

[]: Post by Grimmjow » Wed Jun 15, 2011 5:01 pm I'm a ginger and I have no freckles. Coppercab is a troll and makes us look like tools, however I will give it to him that the the ginger jokes are getting old and offensive.

[]: Post by Sachi » Wed Jun 15, 2011 7:11 pm I wouldn't consider Asuka a ginger, so I've yet to meet one with a soul.

[]: Post by Trajan » Wed Jun 15, 2011 7:51 pm Mildly entertaining *waits for someone to come in and say Asuka's hair is 'strawberry blonde'.

[]: Post by Stryker » Wed Jun 15, 2011 7:54 pm Trajan wrote: waits for someone to come in and say Asuka's hair is 'strawberry blonde'.

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Wed Jun 15, 2011 7:57 pm A ginger, as defined by Eric Cartman, is someone with red hair, pale skin, and freckles. NGE Asuka lacks the freckles, Proposal Asuka lacks the red hair.

[]: Post by Trajan » Wed Jun 15, 2011 7:59 pm Go to Wikipedia young Stryker

[]: Post by Sachi » Wed Jun 15, 2011 8:04 pm TehDonutKing wrote: A ginger, as defined by Eric Cartman, is someone with red hair, pale skin, and freckles.

[]: Post by Stryker » Wed Jun 15, 2011 8:05 pm TehDonutKing wrote: A ginger, as defined by Eric Cartman, is someone with red hair, pale skin, and freckles.

[]: Post by Bagheera » Wed Jun 15, 2011 8:26 pm Miuzaki wrote: As for her hair color... that one wont be decided anytime soon. She has thousands of them.
